Perfect! The task has been completed successfully. Let me create a final summary document:
## Summary
I have successfully replaced all occurrences of `erk-plan` with `erk-pr` across 39 documentation and skill files in the erk repository.
### Key Results
- **Total Files Modified:** 39 - **Total Replacements:** 104 - **Files Excluded (as instructed):** - `CHANGELOG.md` - historical references preserved - `.claude/skills/erk-planning/SKILL.md` - tombstone file kept as-is
### Verification
✓ Zero instances of standalone `erk-plan` remain in the codebase ✓ The term `erk-planning` (with "ing" suffix) was preserved unchanged ✓ All replacements were verified using grep and pattern matching
### Files Modified by Category
**Documentation (docs/):** 29 files - User docs: 1 file - TUI docs: 4 files - Planning docs: 9 files - Architecture docs: 3 files - CLI docs: 4 files - Other learned docs: 8 files
**Skills (.claude/skills/):** 3 files - objective skill and references - erk-exec skill
**Commands (.claude/commands/):** 7 files - Local commands: 2 files - Erk commands: 4 files - System commands: 1 file
### Top Files by Replacement Count
1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/architecture/github-graphql-label-semantics.md` - 9 replacements 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/skills/objective/references/workflow.md` - 9 replacements 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/view-switching.md` - 6 replacements 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/planning/learn-vs-implementation-plans.md` - 5 replacements 5. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/commands/erk/replan.md` - 5 replacements
All changes have been applied successfully and verified. The codebase is now consistent with the new `erk-pr` terminology while preserving historical references and tombstone files as instructed.
